hyperedges.label: Frame processing flow via Redis Streams

nodes.label: One camera entry from Redis key cameras:{tenant_id} (JSON array).
nodes.norm_label: one camera entry from redis key cameras:{tenant_id} (json array).

nodes.label: Sub-stream is used for AI; fall back to main.
nodes.norm_label: sub-stream is used for ai; fall back to main.

nodes.label: One detected object, pipeline-neutral (no ultralytics/supervision types).
nodes.norm_label: one detected object, pipeline-neutral (no ultralytics/supervision types).

nodes.label: Replaceable object detector. The implementation (YOLO, TensorRT, ONNX,     OpenV
nodes.norm_label: replaceable object detector. the implementation (yolo, tensorrt, onnx,     openv

nodes.label: Synchronous GPU/CPU inference; the caller serializes GPU access.
nodes.norm_label: synchronous gpu/cpu inference; the caller serializes gpu access.

nodes.label: Factory by the make_embedder() pattern: pick by config. There is no     silent f
nodes.norm_label: factory by the make_embedder() pattern: pick by config. there is no     silent f

nodes.label: Person detections → sv.Detections for ByteTrack (its native input).
nodes.norm_label: person detections → sv.detections for bytetrack (its native input).

nodes.label: Single GPU process. Runs all tenant cameras concurrently via asyncio;     YOLO i
nodes.norm_label: single gpu process. runs all tenant cameras concurrently via asyncio;     yolo i

nodes.label: Capacity numbers the admin UI / future monitoring can read; until         these
nodes.norm_label: capacity numbers the admin ui / future monitoring can read; until         these

nodes.label: Re-read reid config/staff gallery + persist dirty embeddings/crops.
nodes.norm_label: re-read reid config/staff gallery + persist dirty embeddings/crops.

nodes.label: Re-read enabled features so admin toggles apply without a restart.         Reuse
nodes.norm_label: re-read enabled features so admin toggles apply without a restart.         reuse

nodes.label: Ultralytics YOLO behind the Detector protocol (current default).
nodes.norm_label: ultralytics yolo behind the detector protocol (current default).

nodes.label: One ffmpeg `-f segment` process per camera (main stream, -c copy).     A watcher
nodes.norm_label: one ffmpeg `-f segment` process per camera (main stream, -c copy).     a watcher

nodes.label: RTSP pull via OpenCV with exponential-backoff reconnect.      One dead camera ne
nodes.norm_label: rtsp pull via opencv with exponential-backoff reconnect.      one dead camera ne

nodes.label: Local file source for tests. loop=True replays the file endlessly.
nodes.norm_label: local file source for tests. loop=true replays the file endlessly.

nodes.label: One tracked person in the current frame, with its zone membership.
nodes.norm_label: one tracked person in the current frame, with its zone membership.

nodes.label: Stable per-person key for plugin state/cooldowns: reid identity when         ava
nodes.norm_label: stable per-person key for plugin state/cooldowns: reid identity when         ava

nodes.label: Per-frame snapshot handed to every active plugin after geofencing.
nodes.norm_label: per-frame snapshot handed to every active plugin after geofencing.

nodes.label: Per-frame feature detector. One instance per worker; plugins own their     own s
nodes.norm_label: per-frame feature detector. one instance per worker; plugins own their     own s

nodes.label: Defaults for the FeaturePlugin contract. Existing geometry plugins     inherit t
nodes.norm_label: defaults for the featureplugin contract. existing geometry plugins     inherit t

nodes.label: People counting / occupancy. Produces no events — writes throttled     metrics t
nodes.norm_label: people counting / occupancy. produces no events — writes throttled     metrics t

nodes.label: People-count safety rules: crowding and lone work.      Crowd: emits a `crowd` e
nodes.norm_label: people-count safety rules: crowding and lone work.      crowd: emits a `crowd` e

nodes.label: Fall detection via pose estimation (yolov8-pose, ready-made model).      A perso
nodes.norm_label: fall detection via pose estimation (yolov8-pose, ready-made model).      a perso

nodes.label: PPE (helmet/vest) control in `required_ppe` zones.      Own auxiliary YOLO model
nodes.norm_label: ppe (helmet/vest) control in `required_ppe` zones.      own auxiliary yolo model

nodes.label: Torch-allocated VRAM of this process, MB. None on CPU-only.
nodes.norm_label: torch-allocated vram of this process, mb. none on cpu-only.

nodes.label: Loads the tenant's enabled feature plugins and dispatches each frame.      Enabl
nodes.norm_label: loads the tenant's enabled feature plugins and dispatches each frame.      enabl

nodes.label: Union of extra class ids the active plugins want from the MAIN         detector
nodes.norm_label: union of extra class ids the active plugins want from the main         detector

nodes.label: Service / repack activity at a counter desk (ПВЗ).      Heuristic MVP: a track t
nodes.norm_label: service / repack activity at a counter desk (пвз).      heuristic mvp: a track t

nodes.label: Detects item taken/placed on a `shelf` zone by comparing the region to a     ref
nodes.norm_label: detects item taken/placed on a `shelf` zone by comparing the region to a     ref

nodes.label: HSV histogram of upper/lower body halves, L2-normalized.
nodes.norm_label: hsv histogram of upper/lower body halves, l2-normalized.

nodes.label: OSNet-style ONNX Re-ID model (optional upgrade, needs onnxruntime).
nodes.norm_label: osnet-style onnx re-id model (optional upgrade, needs onnxruntime).

nodes.label: Both inputs are L2-normalized → plain dot product.
nodes.norm_label: both inputs are l2-normalized → plain dot product.

nodes.label: L2-normalized embedding of the largest face in the image, or None.
nodes.norm_label: l2-normalized embedding of the largest face in the image, or none.

nodes.label: Cross-camera person identity for one tenant.      Per-site gallery of appearance
nodes.norm_label: cross-camera person identity for one tenant.      per-site gallery of appearance

nodes.label: Re-read feature flag/config + staff gallery. Called every ~30s.
nodes.norm_label: re-read feature flag/config + staff gallery. called every ~30s.

nodes.label: Lazy-load the site gallery once (no-op afterwards).
nodes.norm_label: lazy-load the site gallery once (no-op afterwards).

nodes.label: Write dirty gallery entries back to Redis + expire stale ones.         Also uplo
nodes.norm_label: write dirty gallery entries back to redis + expire stale ones.         also uplo

nodes.label: Persist face-confirmed outfit embeddings (queued by resolve).
nodes.norm_label: persist face-confirmed outfit embeddings (queued by resolve).

nodes.label: Drop phantom visitor identities of recognized staff (queued by resolve).
nodes.norm_label: drop phantom visitor identities of recognized staff (queued by resolve).

nodes.label: Photos queued by the API («Люди»: фото сотрудника / кроп с камеры)         → fac
nodes.norm_label: photos queued by the api («люди»: фото сотрудника / кроп с камеры)         → fac

nodes.label: [frm, to) window in HH:MM, may wrap midnight. Empty/equal → False.
nodes.norm_label: [frm, to) window in hh:mm, may wrap midnight. empty/equal → false.

nodes.label: Internal track event fed from worker after ByteTrack (pixel bbox).
nodes.norm_label: internal track event fed from worker after bytetrack (pixel bbox).

nodes.label: Geofencing + dwell tracking. process() is pure/sync (testable);     emit() and t
nodes.norm_label: geofencing + dwell tracking. process() is pure/sync (testable);     emit() and t

nodes.label: IDs of active zones whose polygon contains the normalized point.
nodes.norm_label: ids of active zones whose polygon contains the normalized point.

nodes.label: Emit zone_exit for tracks not seen within track_lost_seconds.
nodes.norm_label: emit zone_exit for tracks not seen within track_lost_seconds.

nodes.label: ViziAI — VMS-платформа видеоаналитики для ПВЗ и производств (РФ)
nodes.norm_label: viziai — vms-платформа видеоаналитики для пвз и производств (рф)

nodes.label: Развёртывание: домашний ПК (GPU-сервер) + VPS (публичная точка входа)
nodes.norm_label: развертывание: домашнии пк (gpu-сервер) + vps (публичная точка входа)

nodes.label: 7. Если пока остаёшься на Windows + WSL2 (не рекомендуется для прода)
nodes.norm_label: 7. если пока остаешься на windows + wsl2 (не рекомендуется для прода)

nodes.norm_label: установка ubuntu server 24.04 lts на домашнии пк-сервер

nodes.norm_label: блок a — быстрые победы (по дню, делать первыми)

nodes.norm_label: сделано 2026-07-17 (фундамент многомодельности; не проверено на проде)

nodes.norm_label: сделано 2026-07-19 (отчеты от + работа в одиночку; не проверено на проде)
